meta.label: 经典名言 B2
meta.description: 经典英语名言警句，提升语感和文化理解

lessons.title: 人生智慧
lessons.description: 关于人生、成长和智慧的经典名言

sentences.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
sentences.translation: 做出伟大成就的唯一方式就是热爱你所做的事情。

sentences.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
sentences.translation: 重要的不是你走得多慢，而是你不要停下脚步。

sentences.text: What we think we become, so choose your thoughts wisely.
sentences.translation: 我们想什么就会成为什么，所以要明智地选择你的想法。

sentences.text: The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago.
sentences.translation: 种一棵树最好的时间是二十年前。

sentences.text: The second best time is now so start today without hesitation.
sentences.translation: 其次是现在，所以毫不犹豫地从今天开始吧。

sentences.text: We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them.
sentences.translation: 我们不能用制造问题时的思维方式来解决问题。

lessons.title: 激励与勇气
lessons.description: 鼓舞人心、激励前行的名言警句

sentences.text: Success is not final and failure is not fatal.
sentences.translation: 成功不是终点，失败也不是末日。

sentences.text: It is the courage to continue that counts in the end.
sentences.translation: 真正重要的是继续前行的勇气。

sentences.text: Believe you can and you are already halfway there.
sentences.translation: 相信你能行，你就已经成功了一半。

sentences.text: Do not wait for the perfect moment because it will never arrive.
sentences.translation: 不要等待完美的时刻，因为它永远不会来。

sentences.text: Take the moment and make it perfect instead of waiting around.
sentences.translation: 把握当下，把它变得完美，而不是空等。

sentences.text: Your future is created by what you do today not tomorrow.
sentences.translation: 你的未来是由你今天而不是明天所做的创造的。

sentences.text: Every accomplishment starts with the decision to try something new.
sentences.translation: 每一项成就都始于尝试新事物的决定。
